name: Asana
description: Manage tasks, projects, and teams in Asana

setupSteps.title: Create an Asana OAuth app
setupSteps.instructions: Open Asana developer console → click Create new app. Name it anything (e.g. "Vodou Local").

setupSteps.title: Configure OAuth redirect URL
setupSteps.instructions:
In your new app, open OAuth settings. Set Redirect URL to:
http://localhost:8765/api/oauth/callback

setupSteps.title: Set distribution to a workspace
setupSteps.instructions: Open Manage distribution. Choose Specific workspaces and add at least one workspace.
setupSteps.gotcha: If you skip this step or pick "Specific workspaces" with none selected, your tokens will be silently rejected with no helpful error.

setupSteps.title: Copy Client ID + Client Secret
setupSteps.instructions: Back on the app overview, copy the Client ID and Client Secret.

setupSteps.title: Paste below + Connect
setupSteps.instructions: Paste both into the form, click Connect, and authorize in the popup.
